text: The system shall respond quickly to all user interactions.
The login page must be user-friendly and intuitive.
The system shall validate user input before processing.
The application shall provide sufficient storage for user data.
The API must handle sensor timeout errors gracefully and retry as needed.
The system shall generate reports in PDF and CSV formats.
The dashboard must display real-time data to users.
All configuration settings shall be flexible and easy to modify.
The system must always maintain data integrity and shall not corrupt records.
The notification service shall send alerts to users when thresholds are exceeded.
